title: cinnamomum piniodorum
intro: Cinnamomum piniodorum, also known as Sandalwood tree or Indian sandalwood, is a species of evergreen tree native to India and Southeast Asia. This tree is valued for its fragrant heartwood, which has been used for centuries in traditional medicine and perfumery due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cinnamomum piniodorum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and treating various skin conditions, such as acne and wounds. The herbal preparations of Cinnamomum piniodorum include essential oil, powder, and decoctions, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare, and traditional medicine.
